title: saxifraga lingulata subsp. australis
intro: Saxifraga lingulata subsp. australis, also known as the Mountain Saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as fighting off infections. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce stress and improve mood, due to its adaptogenic properties. The herbal preparations of Saxifraga lingulata subsp. australis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
